title: Allogene Therapeutics Provides Updated Phase 1 Data Highlighting Durable Responses with ALLO-316 in Heavily Pretreated Advanced Renal Cell Carcinoma at ASCO
text: Allogene presented updated data from the Phase 1 TRAVERSE study of ALLO-316 in renal cell carcinoma during an oral presentation at the 2025 ASCO Annual Meeting. The Phase 1b expansion cohort treated patients with a standard regimen of cyclophosphamide and fludarabine followed by a single dose of 80 million AlloCAR T cells. The company highlighted durable clinical responses and a favorable safety profile in this solid tumor indication, supporting continued development of ALLO-316 for renal cell carcinoma patients.
